$comment: scripts/Route22Gate.asm — the one gate house entered from two different maps: all four doors are LAST_MAP warps, so pokered re-picks wLastMap from the half of the building the player stands in (wYCoord < 4 -> ROUTE_23). Without it Route 23 — and the League — is unreachable on foot (gh #87). Non-consuming poke; the id's 'a_' keeps it sorted before the badge check so it runs on shared cells.
